description: A student wants to sign up for a new plan and apply a student discount.

nodes.task_description: Explain the student discount program and its verification requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the need for a valid student ID or email.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer to the online student verification portal (e.g., UNiDAYS).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct link and instructions.

nodes.task_description: Once verified, create the new account and apply the student discount promotion.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the account with the discount applied.
